title: man #4478
definition:
1) manna
    1a) the bread from Heaven that fed the Israelites for 40 years of
        wilderness wanderings
    1b) means 'What is it?'
nasbUsage:

    1a) the bread from Heaven that fed the Israelites for 40 years of
        wilderness wanderings
    1b) means 'What is it?'
